text: NOW: Israel–Lebanon ceasefire comes into effect, per Trump’s timeline.
text_zh: 即时消息：根据特朗普的时间表，以色列-黎巴嫩停火协议已生效。

text: ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CENTCOM: The USS Abraham Lincoln is transiting the Arabian Sea as U.S. forces enforce a blockade of Iran's ports and coastline. CENTCOM clarified that the blockade does not extend to the Strait of Hormuz. More than 10,000 American service members, 12 ships and over 100 aircraft are currently enforcing the blockade in regional waters. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部：亚伯拉罕·林肯号航空母舰正在穿越阿拉伯海，美军正在执行对伊朗港口和海岸线的封锁。中央司令部澄清，封锁范围不包括霍尔木兹海峡。目前有超过10,000名美军士兵、12艘舰艇和100多架飞机正在区域水域执行封锁任务。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部谢莫纳及其周边对抗线地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: Visioner RT @StatWatch25 : 🚁 🇺🇸 Procurement of UH-60M Black Hawk Helicopters for the U.S. Army The U.S. Department of Defense has awarded a contract to Sikorsky for the delivery of ten UH-60M Black Hawk helicopters for the U.S. Army. The agreement is valued at $65 million, with completion scheduled for December 31, 2026. The work will be carried out in Stratford, Connecticut. Because nothing says “routine procurement” like quietly adding more Black Hawks to the fleet. Video made Grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @StatWatch25 ：🚁 🇺🇸 美国陆军采购UH-60M“黑鹰”直升机。美国国防部已授予西科斯基公司一份合同，为美国陆军交付十架UH-60M“黑鹰”直升机。该协议价值6500万美元，计划于2026年12月31日完成。工作将在康涅狄格州斯特拉特福进行。因为没有什么比悄悄增加更多“黑鹰”直升机更能体现“常规采购”了。视频由Grok AI制作 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 The UAE welcomed the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire and praised Trump's efforts to reach the deal. Abu Dhabi said it hopes the ceasefire will support regional stability and backed Lebanon's moves to consolidate all weapons under state control and dismantle terrorist organizations. The Gulf Cooperation Council also welcomed the agreement. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息 🔴 阿联酋欢迎以色列-黎巴嫩停火，并赞扬特朗普为达成该协议所做的努力。阿布扎比表示，希望停火能支持地区稳定，并支持黎巴嫩将所有武器置于国家控制之下并解散恐怖组织的举措。海湾合作委员会也对该协议表示欢迎。推文

text: U.S. Central Command USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72) transits the Arabian Sea as the United States blockades Iran's ports and coastline. U.S. forces are NOT blockading the Strait of Hormuz. More than 10,000 American service members, 12+ ships, and 100+ aircraft have enforced the blockade in regional waters, ensuring that no vessels violate the President's proclamation. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 亚伯拉罕·林肯号航空母舰（CVN 72）在美军封锁伊朗港口和海岸线时穿越阿拉伯海。美军并未封锁霍尔木兹海峡。超过10,000名美军士兵、12艘以上舰艇和100多架飞机已在区域水域执行封锁，确保没有任何船只违反总统的公告。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @TheIntelFrog : The incident at F.E. Warren AFB in Cheyenne, WY has been resolved. https://twitter.com/TheIntelFrog/status/2044869276096405749/photo/1 A suspicious package at Gate 1 of F.E. Warren Air Force Base in Cheyenne, WY has led to the establishment of a 1,850' cordon around the gate affecting several buildings on base. F.E. Warren AFB is notable for hosting Minuteman III intercontinental ballistic missiles. https://twitter.com/TheIntelFrog/status/2044816752454894062/photo/1 - TheIntelFrog tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转发 @TheIntelFrog ：怀俄明州夏延市F.E.沃伦空军基地的事件已得到解决。https://twitter.com/TheIntelFrog/status/2044869276096405749/photo/1 怀俄明州夏延市F.E.沃伦空军基地1号门的一个可疑包裹导致基地大门周围建立了1,850英尺的警戒线，影响了基地内的几座建筑物。F.E.沃伦空军基地以部署“民兵III”洲际弹道导弹而闻名。https://twitter.com/TheIntelFrog/status/2044816752454894062/photo/1 - TheIntelFrog 推文

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇷🇺 🇸🇪 BREAKING | According The Times, Sweden is preparing for the fact that Russia can occupy an island in the Baltic Sea at any moment to test NATO's reaction. According to the commander-in-chief of the Armed Forces, Kremlin, if it wishes, can carry out a limited naval attack at least tomorrow to reveal disagreements within the Alliance against the backdrop of Trump's threats. "There are about 400 thousand islands in the Baltic Sea, so the question is only in Russia's choice. I believe that in order to challenge the Alliance, it is enough to occupy almost any of them. This does not necessarily have to be a large-scale operation - rather a symbolic step to see what the political reaction will be," - he notes. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇷🇺 🇸🇪 突发 | 据《泰晤士报》报道，瑞典正准备应对俄罗斯可能随时占领波罗的海岛屿以测试北约反应的情况。据武装部队总司令称，克里姆林宫如果愿意，至少明天就可以进行有限的海军攻击，以揭示在特朗普威胁背景下联盟内部的分歧。“波罗的海大约有40万个岛屿，所以问题只在于俄罗斯的选择。我相信，为了挑战联盟，占领其中几乎任何一个就足够了。这不一定是一场大规模行动——而是一个象征性的步骤，看看政治反应会是什么，”他指出。与我们一起查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : I beg you... We just finished a "Russia Invades Narva" news cycle, much of it predicated on a fugazi social media campaign -- and a decade after a similar panic gripped global attention in 2014. We are now apparently in another "Russia Invades Gotland" news cycle, a staple of Swedish potboiler fiction for decades. The better question military planners and foreign correspondents should be asking is this: What if the Russians invade Saaremaa and decide they like it so much, they defect? It'd be like "The Island of Crimea" in reverse. Turn those frowns upside down, NATO. https://www.thetimes.com/world/europe/article/russia-attack-nato-island-baltic-sweden-6hndcgllp#selection-2075.0-2255.320 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @michaeldweiss ：我求求你们……我们刚刚结束了一个“俄罗斯入侵纳尔瓦”的新闻周期，其中大部分是基于虚假的社交媒体宣传——而这距离2014年类似的恐慌席卷全球关注已经过去十年了。我们现在显然又进入了另一个“俄罗斯入侵哥特兰”的新闻周期，这是几十年来瑞典惊悚小说的主要内容。军事规划者和外国记者应该问的更好的问题是：如果俄罗斯人入侵萨雷马岛并决定他们非常喜欢那里，他们叛逃了怎么办？这就像是反向的《克里米亚岛》。把那些愁容转为笑容吧，北约。https://www.thetimes.com/world/europe/article/russia-attack-nato-island-baltic-sweden-6hndcgllp#selection-2075.0-2255.320 推文

text: The U.S. has quietly warned some European allies to expect delays in weapons deliveries because the Iran war is draining U.S. stockpiles. The Pentagon is prioritizing its own needs and ongoing operations. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 美国已悄悄警告一些欧洲盟友，由于伊朗战争正在消耗美国的库存，武器交付可能会出现延迟。五角大楼正在优先考虑自身需求和正在进行的行动。来源：路透社

text: 📸 U.S. sailors on the USS Abraham Lincoln aircraft carrier are reporting poor-quality food and small portions during a long deployment near Iran. Because of extended operations and strained supply lines, crews are relying on limited resupply at sea, leading to rationing and lower morale. Families say sailors are often hungry, and mail disruptions mean they can’t send extra food or supplies. Source: USA Today
text_zh: 📸 在伊朗附近长期部署期间，美国“亚伯拉罕·林肯”号航空母舰上的水兵报告称食物质量差且分量少。由于行动延长和补给线紧张，船员们只能依赖有限的海上补给，导致配给制和士气低落。家属们表示，水兵们经常挨饿，而邮件中断意味着他们无法寄送额外的食物或补给。来源：《今日美国》

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel TRUMP: 'The out of control Trump Hating, Washington, D.C. District Court Judge, who doesn't want to accept a $400 Million Dollar GIFT of one of the most beautiful Ballrooms anywhere in the World, desperately needed by the White House and its future Presidents (Due to time constraints, I will barely get to use it!), wants me to build the "underground" portion of the Ballroom, without the "above ground" portion, but the underground doesn't work, isn't necessary, and would indeed be useless, without the above ground sections. The underground portion is wedded to, and serves, the upper portion, including the Bomb Shelters, a State of the Art Hospital and Medical Facilities, Protective Partitioning, Top Secret Military Installations, Structures, and Equipment, Protective Missile Resistant Steel, Columns, Roofs, and Beams, Drone Proof Ceilings and Roofs, Military Grade Venting, and Bullet, Ballistic, and Blast Proof Glass. It's all tied together as one big, expensive, and very complex unit, which is vital for National Security and Military Operations of the United States of America! The Judge's decision, which doesn't even discuss the vital subject of STANDING, of which the plaintiff has none, severely jeopardizes the lives and welfare of the people who work, and will be working, at the White House — including all future Presidents of the United States, and their families. President DONALD J. TRUMP' tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel TRUMP：“这位失控的、仇恨特朗普的华盛顿特区地方法官，不想接受一份价值4亿美元的礼物——世界上最美丽的宴会厅之一，而白宫及其未来的总统们迫切需要它（由于时间紧迫，我几乎没机会使用它！），他想让我建造宴会厅的‘地下’部分，而不建造‘地上’部分。但如果没有地上部分，地下部分根本无法运作，也没有必要，实际上毫无用处。地下部分与地上部分紧密相连并为其服务，包括防空洞、最先进的医院和医疗设施、防护隔断、绝密军事设施、结构和设备、防导弹防护钢、立柱、屋顶和横梁、防无人机天花板和屋顶、军用级通风系统，以及防弹、防爆玻璃。这一切都被整合为一个庞大、昂贵且非常复杂的整体，这对美利坚合众国的国家安全和军事行动至关重要！法官的裁决甚至没有讨论原告根本不具备的‘诉讼资格’这一关键问题，严重危及在白宫工作及未来将要工作的人员的生命和福利——包括所有未来的美国总统及其家人。——唐纳德·J·特朗普总统”的推文

text: OSINTtechnical A recent meal aboard the Lincoln CSG, fighting for months off the coast of Iran. Sailors reportedly say ships in the region have been rationing food supplies as the deployment wears on -USA Today https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044872033792631217/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 林肯号航母打击群上的一顿饭，在伊朗海岸外战斗了数月。据报道，水手们称随着部署时间的延长，该地区的船只一直在配给食物供应 - 今日美国 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044872033792631217/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇵🇦 BREAKING | China has told Danish shipping group Maersk and Switzerland-based Mediterranean ​Shipping Company (MSC Shipping) to cease operating ports ‌on the Panama Canal, the Financial Times reported on Wednesday. In a meeting with China's state planner last month, ​Maersk and MSC Shipping were told to ​withdraw from the Balboa and Cristóbal ports ⁠immediately, the report said, citing two people ​familiar with the talks. Maersk and MSC were told not to "engage ​in illegal activities that harm the interests of Chinese companies, ‌and ⁠to uphold commercial ethics and international rules," the report said. Panama has granted temporary 18-month concessions to keep the terminals operating, with APM Terminals, a unit ​of Maersk, ​managing Balboa ⁠and TIL Panama, a unit of MSC, handling Cristobal. CK Hutchison has faced heavy ​criticism from China since unveiling a ​plan ⁠in March 2025 to sell 43 ports in 23 countries, including the Balboa and Cristóbal ports, ⁠to ​a group led by BlackRock ​and Italian Gianluigi Aponte's family-run shipping firm MSC. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇵🇦 突发 | 据《金融时报》周三报道，中国已告知丹麦航运集团马士基（Maersk）和总部位于瑞士的地中海航运公司（MSC Shipping）停止运营巴拿马运河的港口。报道援引两名知情人士的话称，在上个月与中国国家规划部门的会议上，马士基和MSC航运被告知立即撤出巴尔博亚（Balboa）和克里斯托瓦尔（Cristobal）港口。报道称，马士基和MSC被告知不要“从事损害中国公司利益的非法活动，并遵守商业道德和国际规则”。巴拿马已给予18个月的临时特许权以维持码头运营，马士基旗下的APM码头公司管理巴尔博亚港，MSC旗下的TIL巴拿马公司管理克里斯托瓦尔港。自2025年3月公布计划将23个国家的43个港口（包括巴尔博亚和克里斯托瓦尔港）出售给由贝莱德（BlackRock）和意大利吉安路易吉·阿蓬特（Gianluigi Aponte）家族经营的航运公司MSC领导的财团以来，长江和记实业（CK Hutchison）一直面临中国的严厉批评。通过我们查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: ELINT News RT @ChristopherHale : NEW: Speaker Mike Johnson told reporters today that Pope Leo XIV doesn't understand “something called the just war doctrine.” Pope Leo is an Augustinian friar who spent twelve years leading Augustine’s religious order. Augustine invented the doctrine. https://www.thelettersfromleo.com/p/something-called-the-just-war-doctrine tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转推 @ChristopherHale ：最新消息：众议院议长迈克·约翰逊今天告诉记者，教皇利奥十四世不理解“所谓的正义战争学说”。利奥教皇是一位奥古斯丁修士，曾花费十二年时间领导奥古斯丁的宗教修会。奥古斯丁发明了这一学说。https://www.thelettersfromleo.com/p/something-called-the-just-war-doctrine 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf on the ceasefire: "The ceasefire was nothing but a result of Hezbollah's steadfastness and the unity of the Axis of Resistance; and we will deal with this ceasefire with caution, and we will remain together until the full realization of victory. I thank the mediating efforts of the State of Pakistan and General Asim Munir for endorsing this ceasefire. We are true to our pledge..." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫（Ghalibaf）谈停火：“停火只不过是真主党坚定不移和抵抗轴心团结的结果；我们将谨慎对待这次停火，并将团结一致，直到取得全面胜利。我感谢巴基斯坦国和阿西姆·穆尼尔（Asim Munir）将军为促成此次停火所做的调解努力。我们信守承诺……”推文

text: The Spectator Index Pope Leo XIV says the world is 'being ravaged by a handful of tyrants'. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2044869425292300600/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 教皇利奥十四世称世界“正被少数暴君蹂躏”。https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2044869425292300600/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu: "I spoke with Trump. He is determined to continue the naval blockade and destroy Iran's remaining nuclear capabilities." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044869041680945238/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 内塔尼亚胡：“我与特朗普进行了交谈。他决心继续海上封锁并摧毁伊朗剩余的核能力。”https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044869041680945238/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇩🇪 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Germany has signaled it is ready to deploy minesweepers to the Strait of Hormuz, but only as part of a potential international mission. The issue is expected to be discussed on Friday in Paris, where Merz is set to meet Macron, Starmer and Meloni. According to a German government official, the federal government is "prepared to make a German contribution to ensuring freedom of navigation." That could include "mine clearance or maritime reconnaissance." Conditions: a stable ceasefire, a mandate within a system of collective security — "preferably" from the United Nations — and formal approval by both the federal government and the Bundestag. Merz underlined that Berlin remains "far away" from such a decision. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇩🇪 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 突发 | 德国已表示准备向霍尔木兹海峡部署扫雷舰，但仅作为潜在国际任务的一部分。预计周五在巴黎讨论此问题，届时默茨（Merz）将与马克龙、斯塔默和梅洛尼会面。据一位德国政府官员称，联邦政府“准备为确保航行自由做出德国的贡献”。这可能包括“扫雷或海上侦察”。条件是：稳定的停火，在集体安全体系内的授权——“最好”来自联合国——以及联邦政府和联邦议院的正式批准。默茨强调，柏林距离做出这样的决定还“很遥远”。通过我们查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: The Spectator Index Brent crude oil prices are up 3.5%, trading at $98.2, while US crude is up 2.5% and trading at $93.5. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 布伦特原油价格上涨3.5%，交易价格为98.2美元，而美国原油价格上涨2.5%，交易价格为93.5美元。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @BarakRavid : 🚨 A White House official said that on Wednesday evening, after the Israeli cabinet meeting ended without a decision on a ceasefire, Trump spoke with Netanyahu and asked him for a ceasefire. The White House official said Netanyahu agreed to a ceasefire "with certain terms" 🚨 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Trump announces 10-day ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon and says he will convene summit at the White House between Israel and Lebanese leaders. @DavidLawler10 and I report for @axios https://www.axios.com/2026/04/16/lebanon-ceasefire-trump-aoun-israel-netanyahu - Barak Ravid tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (War & Military News) 转推 @BarakRavid ：🚨 一位白宫官员表示，周三晚上，在以色列内阁会议结束且未就停火做出决定后，特朗普与内塔尼亚胡进行了交谈，并要求他停火。白宫官员称，内塔尼亚胡同意“在特定条款下”停火 🚨 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 特朗普宣布以色列与黎巴嫩之间停火10天，并表示将在白宫召集以色列和黎巴嫩领导人峰会。@DavidLawler10 和我为 @axios 报道 https://www.axios.com/2026/04/16/lebanon-ceasefire-trump-aoun-israel-netanyahu - Barak Ravid 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF says it is striking Hezbollah launchers used to fire rockets at northern Israel a short time ago. Over 30 rockets launched from Lebanon toward northern Israel in the past hour. One man seriously injured by shrapnel in Karmiel. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044865154421080120/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军称，不久前正在打击用于向以色列北部发射火箭弹的真主党发射装置。过去一小时内，从黎巴嫩向以色列北部发射了30多枚火箭弹。一名男子在卡尔米尔（Karmiel）被弹片严重炸伤。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044865154421080120/video/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel Fox News: Democrats could lose up to 14 net Electoral College seats after the 2030 Census as population shifts favor red states. Projected gains: FL +2, TX +3, ID +1, UT +1 Projected losses: CA -3, NY -1, IL -2, RI -1 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044868452536500637/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 福克斯新闻：随着人口转移有利于共和党州，民主党在2030年人口普查后可能会损失多达14个选举人团席位。预计增长：佛罗里达州+2，德克萨斯州+3，爱达荷州+1，犹他州+1 预计损失：加利福尼亚州-3，纽约州-1，伊利诺伊州-2，罗德岛州-1 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044868452536500637/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index US officials have told their European counterparts that some weapons delivers 'are ​likely to be delayed ​as the Iran war continues to ⁠draw on weapons stocks', according to Reuters report. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据路透社报道，美国官员已告知欧洲同行，由于伊朗战争继续消耗武器库存，一些武器交付“可能会推迟”。推文

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: As I said last night as well, the ceasefire was nothing but a result of Hezbollah's steadfastness and the unity of the Axis of Resistance; and we will deal with this ceasefire with caution, and we will remain together until the full realization of victory. I thank the mediating efforts of the State of Pakistan and General Asim Munir for endorsing this ceasefire. We are true to our pledge...
text_zh: 伊朗的卡利巴夫：正如我昨晚所说，停火只不过是真主党坚定不移和抵抗轴心团结的结果；我们将谨慎对待这次停火，并将团结一致，直到取得全面胜利。我感谢巴基斯坦国和阿西姆·穆尼尔（Asim Munir）将军为促成此次停火所做的调解努力。我们信守承诺……

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 MDA reported that a man in his 40s was moderately injured by Hezbollah rocket barrages on Nahariya. Additionally, two cars were set ablaze by the impact. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Addtional photos of the two cars on fire in Nahariya. @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧A major Hezbollah barrage targeting Karmiel is ongoing, with MDA reporting several injured, one of them in serious condition. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 MDA reported that a man in his 40s was moderately injured by Hezbollah rocket barrages on Nahariya. Additionally, two cars were set ablaze by the impact. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 真主党对卡尔米勒发动的大规模火箭弹袭击仍在持续，MDA报告称有多人受伤，其中一人伤势严重。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 MDA报告称，一名40多岁的男子在真主党的火箭弹袭击中受中度伤。此外，两辆汽车被击中起火。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "Five rockets were fired at Nahariya, four of which were intercepted, and the rest hit open areas, per the IDF. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The IDF reports that they're currently striking Hezbollah rocket launching positons used to fire at Israel earlier this evening. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“据以色列国防军称，五枚火箭弹射向纳哈里亚，其中四枚被拦截，其余落在开阔地带。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列国防军报告称，他们目前正在打击今晚早些时候用于向以色列发射火箭弹的真主党发射阵地。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Iranian President Pezeshkian met with Pakistan's Chief of Defence Forces Munir during his official visit to Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬在对伊朗进行正式访问期间会见了巴基斯坦国防军总司令穆尼尔。 @wfwitness
